overall.description: Gameplay footage from an open-world driving game (Mafia III) set in a fictional 1960s American city at night. The player drives a vehicle through urban streets, stopping at intersections for pedestrians and traffic, passing by commercial buildings, a civic courthouse, and neon-lit storefronts. The scene features period-appropriate architecture with mixed lighting from street lamps and building signs against a starry night sky.

agents.ego_description: driving forward on multi-lane city street following a sedan ahead, approaching an intersection with a large billboard visible on the left

notable_agents.action: sedan driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard with 'BIG BREAK' text mounted on building
illuminated arch bridge structure visible in the distance down the road
low-rise commercial building with illuminated windows and signage
mixed-use building with storefronts on ground level

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives along a wide multi-lane city street at night, following a sedan ahead. A prominent 'Big Break' billboard is visible on the left, and an illuminated arch bridge stands in the distance. Commercial buildings line both sides of the street under clear starry skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and stop line

events.description: vehicle comes to complete stop at painted stop line marking on road
pedestrians begin crossing the crosswalk in front of the vehicle
vehicle initiates right turn maneuver after yielding to pedestrians

agents.ego_description: stopping at the intersection stop line to yield to crossing pedestrians, then executing a right turn alongside a white convertible

notable_agents.action: white convertible pulls up alongside on the right, then proceeds through the intersection parallel to ego vehicle
pedestrian in dark clothing crossing the street from right to left in front of stopped vehicles

entered.detail: white painted zebra crossing lines on the asphalt
white painted stop line with 'STOP' text on the road surface

segments.scene_description: The vehicle stops at a marked intersection to allow pedestrians to cross. A white convertible pulls up alongside on the right. After yielding, the vehicle turns right onto a new street, leaving the billboard and arch bridge behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential mixed-use street with tree-lined sidewalks

agents.ego_description: driving forward through city streets following the white convertible, passing residential buildings and street trees

notable_agents.action: white convertible maintaining position ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: multi-story brick apartment building with fire escapes
row of connected townhouses with stoops and windows
mature trees lining the sidewalk with illuminated leaves

segments.scene_description: Driving along a residential street lined with apartment buildings and mature trees. The white convertible remains ahead as the vehicle progresses toward the next intersection, transitioning from commercial to residential architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with civic buildings and wide pedestrian crossing

events.description: vehicle stops at intersection to allow group of pedestrians to cross the wide crosswalk
vehicle completes right turn onto street adjacent to large civic building after pedestrians clear

agents.ego_description: stopping at intersection for multiple pedestrians crossing, then turning right past a prominent civic building with classical columns

notable_agents.action: woman in yellow dress crossing from left to right in front of the stopped vehicle
group of three pedestrians crossing the wide intersection from left side

entered.detail: large classical civic building with tall columns and illuminated facade, resembling a courthouse or city hall
painted stop line with right-turn arrow marking on the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle stops at a major intersection where multiple pedestrians are crossing, including a woman in a yellow dress. After yielding, the vehicle turns right, revealing a grand civic building with classical architecture and illuminated columns on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: civic district transitioning to commercial area with neon signage

events.description: transition from civic building district to commercial area with neon signs and storefronts

agents.ego_description: driving past the illuminated civic building and continuing through streets transitioning to commercial areas with neon signs

entered.detail: illuminated neon sign reading 'Steakhouse' on the right side of the street
historic brick commercial building with large display windows

segments.scene_description: Driving along a street that transitions from civic architecture to commercial districts. The vehicle passes the courthouse and enters an area with neon signage including a prominent 'Steakhouse' sign, with historic commercial buildings lining the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial downtown street with various storefronts and neon lighting

agents.ego_description: driving through the commercial district passing various illuminated storefronts, neon signs, and other vehicles

entered.detail: multiple commercial storefronts with illuminated signs and awnings
various colorful neon signs advertising businesses along the street

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues through a vibrant commercial downtown area at night, passing by various illuminated storefronts and colorful neon signs. The street is lined with businesses on both sides as the vehicle approaches another intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a 1960s city at night, transitioning from a wide commercial thoroughfare into a residential neighborhood before ending in a vibrant neon-lit downtown. It begins on a multi-lane street passing a Big Break billboard toward a distant illuminated arch bridge, before stopping at an intersection to yield to pedestrians. As the vehicle turns right, the scenery shifts from commercial hubs to a residential area lined with apartment buildings and mature trees, eventually pausing again for a woman in a yellow dress. The camera then turns right once more, moving past the classical columns of a grand civic courthouse as the architecture transitions back toward a commercial district. Finally, the scene opens into a bustling downtown area, passing a prominent Steakhouse sign and a series of colorful neon storefronts that line the street.
